svg.title: PRISM system architecture block diagram
svg.desc: Top-level architecture showing RF front-end, FPGA, MCU, display, wireless, storage, power, and user I/O subsystems with interconnections.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about RF front-end options for PRISM — ADC/DAC, filters, frequency range')
sendPrompt('What FPGA should we use for PRISM? Compare Xilinx Artix-7, Zynq, and alternatives')
sendPrompt('What MCU or MPU should PRISM use? Compare STM32, ESP32, and ARM Cortex options')
sendPrompt('What display options work for PRISM? Size, resolution, interface considerations')
sendPrompt('What user input controls should PRISM have? Buttons, rotary encoder, touchscreen?')
sendPrompt('What storage does PRISM need? SD card, SPI flash, DDR memory?')
sendPrompt('Design the PRISM power system — battery chemistry, charging IC, voltage rails')
sendPrompt('What wireless connectivity should PRISM have? WiFi, Bluetooth, LoRa, or cellular?')
